questions.question: 设随机变量 $X$ 与 $Y$ 的相关系数为 0.2 , 且 $D(X)=25, D(Y)=9$, 则 $D(X-2 Y)=()$.
questions.analysis: $D(X-2 Y)=D(X)+4 D(Y)-4 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=25+36-4 \times 0.2 \times 5 \times 3=49$.

questions.question: 设 $X$ 和 $Y$ 为两个随机变量, 已知相关系数 $\rho_{X Y}=\frac{1}{3}, D(X)=25, D(Y)=36$, 则 $D(X-Y)=()$.
questions.analysis: $D(X-Y)=D(X)+D(Y)-2 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=25+36-2 \times \frac{1}{3} \times 5 \times 6=41$

questions.question: 设 $D(X)=4, D(Y)=1, \rho_{X Y}=0.6$, 则 $D(3 X+2 Y)=()$.
questions.analysis: $D(3 X+2 Y)=9 D(X)+4 D(Y)+12 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=9 D(X)+4 D(Y)+12 \sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)} \rho_{X Y}=54.4$

questions.question: 设 $X$ 服从参数为 2 的泊松分布, $Y=3 X-2$, 则下列选项不正确的是 ( ).
questions.analysis: $\begin{aligned} & E(Y)=E(3 X-2)=3 E(X)-2=3 \times 2-2=4, \\ & D(Y)=D(3 X-2)=9 D(X)=9 \times 2=18, \\ & \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=\operatorname{cov}(X, 3 X-2)=3 D(X)=6, \\ & \rho_{X Y}=\frac{\operatorname{cov}(X, Y)}{\sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)}}=\frac{6}{\sqrt{2} \cdot \sqrt{18}}=1 .\end{aligned}$
questions.ai_tags: 泊松分布,期望与方差,协方差

questions.question: 设 $E(X)=D(X)=1, E(Y)=2, D(Y)=4, \rho_{X Y}=0.6$, 则 $E(2 X+Y-1)^2=()$.
questions.analysis:
$$
\begin{gathered}
E(2 X+Y-1)=2 E(X)+E(Y)-1=3, \\
\operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=\sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)} \rho_{X Y}=1.2,
\end{gathered}
$$

得
$$
D(2 X+Y-1)=4 D(X)+D(Y)+4 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=12.8,
$$

于是
$$
E(2 X+Y-1)^2=D(2 X+Y-1)+[E(2 X+Y-1)]^2=21.8
$$

questions.question: 设 $D(X)=4, D(Y)=1, D(X-Y)=4$, 则 $\rho_{X Y}=()$.
questions.analysis:
由 $D(X-Y)=D(X)+D(Y)-2 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=4$, 得 $\operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=\frac{1}{2}$, 于是
$$
\rho_{X Y}=\frac{\operatorname{cov}(X, Y)}{\sqrt{D(X) D(Y)}}=\frac{1}{4}
$$

questions.question:
设随机变量 $(X, Y)$ 具有概率密度
$$
f(x, y)=\left\{\begin{array}{c}
\frac{1}{8}(x+y), 0 \leq x \leq 2,0 \leq y \leq 2 \\
0, \quad \text { 其它 }
\end{array},\right.
$$

则不正确的是 ( ).
questions.ai_tags: 二维随机变量,协方差,相关系数

questions.question: 若随机变量 $\xi$ 和 $\eta$ 的 $D(\xi)=4, D(\eta)=1, \rho(\xi, \eta)=\frac{1}{2}$, 则 $D(-\xi+\eta)=()$.
questions.analysis: $D(-\xi+\eta)=D(\xi)+D(\eta)-2 \operatorname{cov}(\xi, \eta)=4+1-2 \times \frac{1}{2} \times 2 \times 1=3$.

questions.question: 已知随机变量 $\xi$ 与 $\eta$ 的方差 $D(\xi)=9, D(\eta)=16$, 相关系数 $\rho(\xi, \eta)=0.5$, 则 $D(\xi-\eta)$ 等于 ( ).
questions.analysis:
由随机变量和的方差与协方差的关系、相关系数的定义知，
$$
D(\xi-\eta)=D(\xi)+D(\eta)-2 \operatorname{cov}(\xi, \eta)=D(\xi)+D(\eta)-2 \rho(\xi, \eta) \cdot \sqrt{D(\xi) D(\eta)}=13 .
$$

questions.question: 已知随机变量 $\xi, \eta$ 的 $D(\xi)=4, D(\eta)=1, \rho_{\xi\eta}=0.6$, 则 $D(3 \xi-2 \eta)=(\quad)$.
questions.analysis: $D(3 \xi-2 \eta)=9 D(\xi)+4 D(\eta)-12 \operatorname{cov}(\xi, \eta)=40-12 \rho_{\xi \eta} \sqrt{D(\xi) D(\eta)}=25.6$.

questions.question: 设 $X, Y$ 是随机变量, 且 $D(X)=9, D(Y)=16, \rho_{XY}=\frac{1}{2}$, 则 $D(X+Y)=()$.
questions.analysis: $D(X+Y)=D(X)+D(Y)+2 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=D(X)+D(Y)+2 \rho_{XY} \sqrt{D(X) D(Y)}=25+12=37$.
questions.ai_tags: 随机变量,方差,相关系数

questions.question: 设 $D(X)=25, D(Y)=1, \rho_{X Y}=0.4$, 则 $D(X-Y)=()$.
questions.analysis: $D(X-Y)=D(X)+D(Y)-2 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=26-2 \rho_{X Y} \sqrt{D(X) D(Y)}=26-4=22$.

questions.question: 设随机变量 $X$ 的方差 $D(X)=16$, 随机变量 $Y$ 的方差 $D(Y)=25$, 又 $X$ 与 $Y$ 的相关系数 $\rho_{XY}=0.5$, 则 $D(X+Y)$ 与 $D(X-Y)$ 分别为 ( ).
questions.analysis: $\begin{aligned} D(X+Y) &= D(X)+D(Y)+2 \operatorname{Cov}(X, Y) \\ &= D(X)+D(Y)+2 \sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)} \rho_{XY} \\ &= 16+25+2 \times 4 \times 5 \times 0.5=61 \\ D(X-Y) &= D(X)+D(Y)-2 \operatorname{Cov}(X, Y) \\ &= D(X)+D(Y)-2 \sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)} \rho_{XY} \\ &= 16+25-2 \times 4 \times 5 \times 0.5=21 \end{aligned}$
questions.ai_tags: 随机变量,方差,相关系数

questions.question: 设 $E(X)=D(X)=1, E(Y)=2, D(Y)=4, \rho_{XY}=0.6$, 则 $E[(2X-Y+1)^2]=(\quad)$.
questions.analysis:
由题意知
$$
\begin{aligned}
E(2X-Y+1) &= 2E(X)-E(Y)+1 = 2\times 1 - 2 + 1 = 1, \\
D(2X-Y+1) &= 4D(X)+D(Y)-4\operatorname{cov}(X, Y) \\
&= 4D(X)+D(Y)-4\rho_{XY}\sqrt{D(X)D(Y)} \\
&= 8-4\times 0.6 \times 2 = 3.2.
\end{aligned}
$$
所以
$$
E[(2X-Y+1)^2] = D(2X-Y+1) + [E(2X-Y+1)]^2 = 3.2 + 1^2 = 4.2.
$$
questions.ai_tags: 随机变量的数字特征,数学期望,方差

questions.question: 设 $X$ 服从区间 $(-1,1)$ 内的均匀分布, 则 $X$ 与 $Y=|X|$ 的相关系数 $\rho_{XY}=()$
questions.analysis:
$X$ 的密度函数 $f(x)=\begin{cases} \frac{1}{2}, & -1<x<1 \\ 0, & \text{其它} \end{cases}$, 于是
$$ \begin{gathered} E(X)=\int_{-1}^1 x f(x) d x=\frac{1}{2} \int_{-1}^1 x d x=0, \\ \operatorname{cov}(X,|X|)=E(X|X|)-E(X) E(|X|)=E(X|X|)=\frac{1}{2} \int_{-1}^1 x|x| d x=0, \quad \rho_{XY}=0. \end{gathered} $$
questions.ai_tags: 概率论,均匀分布,相关系数

questions.question: 设两随机变量 $X$ 与 $Y$ 的方差分别为 25 和 16 , 相关系数为 0.4 , 则 $D(2 X+Y), D(X-2 Y)$ 分别为 () .
questions.analysis: $\begin{aligned} D(2 X+Y) & =4 D(X)+D(Y)+4 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=4 D(X)+D(Y)+4 \rho_{XY} \sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)} \\ & =4 \times 25+16+4 \times 0.4 \times \sqrt{25} \times \sqrt{16}=148, \\ D(X-2 Y) & =D(X)+4 D(Y)-4 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=25+4 \times 16-4 \times 0.4 \times \sqrt{25} \times \sqrt{16}=57 .\end{aligned}$

questions.question: 设随机变量 $X$ 服从二项分布 $B(4,0.8), Y$ 服从泊松分布 $P(4)$, 已知 $D(X+Y)=3.6$, 则 $X$ 与 $Y$ 的相关系数 $\rho_{XY}=(\quad)$.
questions.analysis:
由 $X$ 服从二项分布 $B(4,0.8)$, 有 $E(X)=4 \times 0.8=3.2, D(X)=4 \times 0.8 \times 0.2=0.64$. 由 $Y$ 服从泊松分布 $P(4)$,有 $E(Y)=4, D(Y)=4$, 从而
$$
D(X+Y)=D(X)+D(Y)+2 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=D(X)+D(Y)+2 \sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)} \rho_{X Y},
$$

即
$$
3.6=0.64+4+2 \sqrt{0.64} \sqrt{4} \rho_{X Y}
$$

于是,
$$
\rho_{X Y}=\frac{3.6-4.64}{2 \times 0.8 \times 2}=\frac{-1.04}{3.2}=-\frac{13}{40}
$$
questions.ai_tags: 二项分布,泊松分布,相关系数

questions.question: 设随机变量 $X \sim N(1,4)$, 随机变量 $Y$ 服从参数 $\lambda=\frac{1}{2}$ 的指数分布, 其密度函数为 $f_Y(y)=\left\{\begin{array}{c}\frac{1}{2} e^{-\frac{1}{2} y}, y>0 \\ 0, y \leq 0\end{array}\right.$, 而且 $\rho_{X, Y}=\frac{1}{2}$, 则 $\operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=( )$.
questions.analysis:
由 $\rho_{X, Y}=\frac{\operatorname{cov}(X, Y)}{\sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)}}$, 知 $\operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=\rho_{X, Y} \sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)}$.
再由随机变量 $X \sim N(1,4)$, 得 $D(X)=4$; 由随机变量 $Y$ 服从参数 $\lambda=\frac{1}{2}$ 的指数分布, 得 $D(Y)=\frac{1}{\lambda^2}=4$.
所以 $\operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=\rho_{X, Y} \sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)}=\frac{1}{2} \times \sqrt{4} \times \sqrt{4}=2$.
questions.ai_tags: 协方差,正态分布,指数分布

questions.question: 设 $W=(a X+3 Y)^2, E(X)=E(Y)=0, D(X)=4, D(Y)=16, \rho_{X Y}=-0.5$, 则 $E(W)$ 的最小值为 () .
questions.analysis:
$$
\begin{aligned}
E(W)&= E(a X+3 Y)^2=E\left(a^2 X^2+9 Y^2+6 a X Y\right)=a^2 E\left(X^2\right)+9 E\left(Y^2\right)+6 a E(X Y) \\
&= a^2\left\{D(X)+[E(X)]^2\right\}+9\left\{D(Y)+[E(Y)]^2\right\}+6 a[\rho \sqrt{D(X) D(Y)}+E(X) E(Y)] \\
&= 4 a^2+144-24 a=4\left[(a-3)^2+27\right]
\end{aligned}
$$

易见，当 $a=3$ 时，$E(W)$ 达到最小，且 $E(W)_{\text {min }}=4 \times 27=108$。

questions.question: 设 $X, Y$ 是随机变量, 且 $D(X)=25, D(Y)=36, \rho_{XY}=0.4$, 则 $D(2 X-Y)=(\quad)$.
questions.analysis: $\begin{aligned} D(2 X-Y) & =4 D(X)+D(Y)-4 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=100+36-4 \rho_{XY} \sqrt{D(X) D(Y)} \\ & =136-4 \times 0.4 \times 5 \times 6=88\end{aligned}$

questions.question:
设 100 件产品中的一、二、三等品率分别为 $0.8, 0.1$ 和 $0.1$. 现从中随机地取 1 件, 并记
$$
X_i=\begin{cases} 1, & \text{取得 } i \text{ 等品} \\ 0, & \text{其它} \end{cases} \quad (i=1,2,3),
$$
则 $\rho_{X_1 X_2}=(\quad)$.
questions.analysis:
$\left(X_1, X_2\right)$ 的联合分布为
$$
\begin{gathered}
P\left\{X_1=0, X_2=0\right\}=P\left\{X_3=1\right\}=0.1, \quad P\left\{X_1=0, X_2=1\right\}=P\left\{X_2=1\right\}=0.1, \\
P\left\{X_1=1, X_2=0\right\}=P\left\{X_1=1\right\}=0.8, \quad P\left\{X_1=1, X_2=1\right\}=P(\varnothing)=0 .
\end{gathered}
$$

关于 $X_1$ 和 $X_2$ 的边缘分布律分别为
$$
P\left\{X_1=1\right\}=0.8, \quad P\left\{X_1=0\right\}=0.2 ; P\left\{X_2=1\right\}=0.1, \quad P\left\{X_2=0\right\}=0.9 .
$$

于是 $E\left(X_1\right)=0.8, D\left(X_1\right)=0.16 ; E\left(X_2\right)=0.1, D\left(X_2\right)=0.09$, 从而
$$
\rho_{X_1 X_2}=\frac{\operatorname{cov}\left(X_1, X_2\right)}{\sqrt{D\left(X_1\right)} \sqrt{D\left(X_2\right)}}=\frac{E\left(X_1 X_2\right)-E\left(X_1\right) E\left(X_2\right)}{\sqrt{D\left(X_1\right)} \sqrt{D\left(X_2\right)}}=\frac{1 \times 0+0 \times 0.8+0 \times 0.1+0 \times 0.1-0.08}{0.4 \times 0.3}=-\frac{2}{3} .
$$
questions.ai_tags: 相关系数,二维随机变量,协方差

questions.question: 随机变量 $X, Y$ 满足 $D(X)=3, D(Y)=5, \rho_{X Y}=-\frac{1}{2}$, 且 $Z=X-2 Y-2$, 则 $D(Z)=()$.
questions.analysis:
由题意知 $\operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=\rho_{X Y} \sqrt{D(X) D(Y)}=-\frac{\sqrt{15}}{2}$, 所以
$$
D(Z)=D(X-2 Y-2)=D(X)+4 D(Y)-4 \operatorname{cov}(X, Y)=23+2 \sqrt{15} .
$$

questions.question: 已知 $X \sim N\left(1,3^2\right), Y \sim N\left(0,4^2\right), \rho_{X Y}=-\frac{1}{2}$, 设 $Z=\frac{X}{3}+\frac{Y}{2}$, 则 $X$ 与 $Z$ 的相关系数为 ( ).
questions.analysis: $\begin{aligned} & \text { 由 } E(X)=1, D(X)=3^2, E(Y)=0, D(Y)=4^2 \text {, 有 } \\ & E(Z) =E\left(\frac{X}{3}+\frac{Y}{2}\right)=\frac{1}{3} E(X)+\frac{1}{2} E(Y)=\frac{1}{3}, \\ & D(Z) =D\left(\frac{X}{3}+\frac{Y}{2}\right)=\frac{1}{3^2} D(X)+\frac{1}{4} D(Y)+2 \times \frac{1}{3} \times \frac{1}{2} \operatorname{Cov}(X, Y) \\ & \phantom{D(Z)} =1+4+\frac{1}{3} \times \rho_{XY} \times \sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Y)}=5+\frac{1}{3} \times\left(-\frac{1}{2}\right) \times 3 \times 4=3, \\ & \rho_{XZ} =\frac{\operatorname{Cov}(X, Z)}{\sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Z)}}=\frac{\operatorname{Cov}\left(X, \frac{1}{3} X+\frac{1}{2} Y\right)}{\sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Z)}}=\frac{\frac{1}{3} D(X)+\frac{1}{2} \operatorname{Cov}(X, Y)}{\sqrt{D(X)} \sqrt{D(Z)}} \\ & \phantom{\rho_{XZ}} =\frac{\sqrt{D(X)}}{3 \sqrt{D(Z)}}+\frac{\rho_{XY} \sqrt{D(Y)}}{2 \sqrt{D(Z)}} =\frac{3}{3 \sqrt{3}}-\frac{4}{4 \sqrt{3}}=0 .\end{aligned}$
questions.ai_tags: 概率论,正态分布,相关系数
